results.title: Modern 2BR Steps to Beach by HolyGuest

publicDescription.summary: Set on Trumpeldor Street just steps from the beach, this bright 2-bedroom apartment offers a relaxed and modern stay for up to 5 guests. With its sea view, private balcony, and fully renovated design, it’s the perfect spot to enjoy Tel Aviv’s coastal lifestyle in comfort and style.
publicDescription.space:
A bright, easygoing seaside home 🌊

Located on the 4th floor of a well-kept building, this freshly renovated apartment blends modern design with a relaxed coastal vibe. Natural light, sea breeze, and clean interiors set the tone for your stay.

Wake up, open the balcony doors, and enjoy the sea view right from your living space.

✨ Inside the apartment:
• 🌅 Private balcony with open sea view
• Spacious, light-filled living area
• 🛏️ 2 comfortable bedrooms for up to 5 guests
• 🚿 1 modern bathroom
• 🍳 Fully equipped kitchen with sleek finishes
• 🪞 Fresh, minimalist renovation throughout

📍 The location:
Right on Trumpeldor, you’re a few steps from the beach and surrounded by cafés, bakeries, and the best of Tel Aviv’s seaside energy.

🏢 Building:
• 4th floor
• Elevator in the building

🔐 Security:
• Miklat (secured shelter) available in the building

🌆 Good to know:
The area is central and lively, with the natural energy of the city and occasional urban noise.

💙 What makes it special:
• True sea view from the balcony
• Clean, modern, fully renovated feel
• Walkable beach lifestyle
• Perfect base for families or small groups

🚗 Parking:
No private parking. Several public parking solutions are available nearby within walking distance.
publicDescription.access:
Guests have full access to the apartment.

We’re here to make your stay smooth and enjoyable.

• 🏖️ Beach just around the corner

No car needed — the city is at your feet.

publicDescription.neighborhood:
Neve Tsedek is one of Tel Aviv’s most vibrant and historic neighborhoods. Known for its charming streets, boutique shops, and trendy cafes, it offers a mix of old-world charm and modern living. It’s also home to cultural landmarks such as the Suzanne Dellal Centre for Dance and Theatre, making it a hub for art and culture. The neighborhood is walkable and offers easy access to nearby Rothschild Boulevard, the Carmel Market, and the beach.

You’ll love the proximity to local markets, trendy restaurants, and Tel Aviv’s buzzing nightlife scene. The neighborhood has a laid-back atmosphere, perfect for leisurely walks and discovering hidden gems.

results.title: Luxurious 2-Bedroom Apartment in the Heart of Courchevel 1850 – Direct Access to the Slopes and Modern Fireplace

publicDescription.summary: Discover this magnificent 2-bedroom apartment in Courchevel 1850, ideally located just steps away from the famous palace hotels and the lively heart of the resort. You can hit the slopes in no time, all while enjoying the convenience of the ski rental shop located beneath the Hôtel Le Lana. Relax by the modern fireplace or unwind in the spa bathtub after a day on the slopes. Perfect for families or small groups, this chic apartment promises an unforgettable stay.
publicDescription.space:
Welcome to your alpine retreat! Nestled on the 4th floor of the luxury residence "Les Sapins," this 60 m² apartment, newly renovated in 2022, is a peaceful haven in one of the world’s most prestigious ski resorts.

Just steps from five-star hotels and the slopes, this apartment offers easy access to luxury boutiques, gourmet restaurants, and après-ski activities. The location is ideal for fully enjoying the magic of Courchevel 1850.

The apartment comfortably accommodates up to 5 adults or 2 adults and 4 children. The master bedroom features a double bed (180 x 200 cm), while the second bedroom offers a double bed (140 x 200 cm) and two bunk beds suitable for children.

After a day on the slopes, relax in the modern living room around the functional fireplace, or enjoy a soothing soak in the spa bathtub in one of the two bathrooms. The fully equipped kitchen allows you to prepare delicious meals, though the refined restaurants in the area will surely tempt you.
publicDescription.access: Guests have access to the entire apartment, including the modern kitchen, cozy living room with fireplace, and spa bathtub. Use our exclusive HolyGuest app to discover local recommendations, guides, and in-room services.

publicDescription.neighborhood:
Courchevel 1850 is synonymous with glamour and luxury. This apartment is located at the heart of this ambiance, just steps from famous palace hotels, Michelin-starred restaurants, and luxury boutiques. You’ll enjoy direct access to the slopes, perfect for making the most of your skiing experience.

In addition to winter sports, Courchevel offers a multitude of activities such as tobogganing and hiking, all within easy reach. The apartment places you right in the center of the action, eliminating the need for a car.
